items.raw_desc: Üzenőtábla ROCADA 6202, parafa, 90 x 60 cm:    Cork board / bulletin board with surface made of high quality, durable and self-regenerating natural cork board. The frame is made of anodised aluminium and has polymer corners with holes for fixing the wall-mounted wall plate. The back of the board is made of galvanized sheet metal. The board is suitable for attaching documents using standard pins or thumbtacks. The board is fastened to the wall in all 4 corners using the drivers and screws included (if necessary, you can also use your own fasteners). The board can be hung vertically or horizontally. The dimensions given in the product name indicate the overall width and height of the board including the aluminium frame, which is approximately 2 cm wide. The dimensions of the usable area are therefore always approx. 4 cm smaller. Package contents - board, fasteners for wall mounting (4× dowel, 4× screw), picture assembly instructions
